calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar Feb-23-2007 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar Jan-05-2007 Continued To Feb-23-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar Sep-13-2006 Continued To Jan-05-07 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Naznin Challa appearing for trustee Randall Preiser. Sanna Singer appearing for and with Tom Ramm. One issue not resolved. Ms. Challa wants to set a trial date to submit on paper. Ms. Singer is not willing to submit on paper. Trial will take two one-half day. Matter is continued to 1/5/07 at 8:30am for trial. Trial briefs are due 5 days before. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Continued To Sep-13-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth Erhardt appearing for Tom Ramm. Naznin Challa appearing for trustee Randall Preiser. Parties are close to settlement. The trustee will make his settlement offer this week. Ms. Challa still want a trial date. Both counsel agree that trial will not take more than one day. Matter is continued to 9/13. If case is not settled, court will set a trial date. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Continued To Aug-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Naznin Challa appearing for trustee Randall Preiser. Elizabeth Erhardt and Sanna Singer appearing for Tom Ramm. Ms. Erhardt informs the Court that they are close to a global settlement. Ms. Challa wants to submit on the papers regarding the personal property in case the issue does not get resolve. Ms. Erhardt does not have authority from her client to agree to sumbitting on the papers. She will request for a hearing. Court is continuing the matter to 8/30 to set a hearing date. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar Aug-02-2006 Continued To Aug-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Continued To Aug-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Naznin Challa appearing for trustee Randall Preiser. Sanna Singer appearing for Tom Ramm. Parties are in settlement negotiation. Ms. Challa requests for a continuance for two months and she will submitted on paper. Ms. Singer does not agree to submit on paper. She wants an evidentary hearing. Hearing will take a few days. Court is continuing this matter to 8/2 for further status. If the evidentary hearing takes more than two one-half day, court will refer it to the Presiding Judge for trial date. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar Jun-06-2006 Continued To Jul-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Naznin Challa appearing for trustee Randall Preiser. Sanna Singer appearing for Tom Ramm. Parties are exchanging proposal on the personal property. Ms. Singer wants to know the reason for the withold of the $200,000.00 beqeust to Mr. Ramm. Ms. Challa's response is the order is on appeal and they want to look into the no contest clause issue. Matter is continued to 7/5. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar May-02-2006 Continued To Jun-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Sanna Singer appearing for and with Tom Ramm. Naznin Challa appearing for Randall Preiser. Appeal on the Unlawful Detainer case has been filed. Parties has met and confer to work out the personal property issue. Ms. Singer wants a formal accounting and he has not received the $200,000.00 distribution. Ms. Challa does not want to incur additional expense to prepare a formal accounting. She is willing to provide the accounting informations. The $200,000.00 was not distributed because the appeal is still pending. Ms. Singer is willing to accept a less than formal accounting. Parties will meet and confer on the personal property. Matter is continued to 6/6. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar Apr-18-2006 Continued To May-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:NAZNIN CHALLA FOR RANDALL PREISER; SANNA SINGER FOR RANDALL PREISER. THE COURT IS INFORMED THAT THE PERSONAL PROPERTY MATTER HAS NOT BEEN RESOLVED DUE TO AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION THAT IS STILL PENDING. THE MOTION TO VACATE HAS BEEN DENIED. THE DEADLINE TO FILE AN APPEAL IS APRIL 20, 2006. MR RAM HAS VACATED THE PREMISES. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO MAY 02, 2006. JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN. REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN, CSR 11722. CLERK:ROSIE NOGUERA.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar Mar-21-2006 Continued To Apr-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Naznin Challa appearing for trustee. Sanna Singer appearing for Tom Ramm. Motion to vacate the Unlawful Detainer matter is set for hearing on Friday. Everything is on hold until after that hearing. Matter is continued to 4/18 for status. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teanna L. Ward CSR#11918. Clerk: Ella Yip.
